verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Come fill this void and emptiness Shine Your light on my darkness Satisfy and restore my soul I long for You to make me whole

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Come quench this thirsting Lord, I am ready Here I am waiting, come fill my heart You are the only One who can fill me Here I am waiting, come fill my heart

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Come fill my life, I am incomplete Let Your love rain down on me I need You more, Lord, I confess More of You and nothing less
